name: Yellow Curry Chicken
recipeIngredient: 2 Potatoes; peeled and cut into pieces, pre-cooked
2 Carrots; cut into bite-size pieces, pre-cooked
recipeInstructions:
1. Pre-cook potatoes and carrots. Do not cook them too done, as they will simmer with the main dish later.
2. Cut boneless, skinless chicken breast into bite-size pieces.
3. Wash and cut fresh vegetables into bite-size pieces.
4. In a heavy saucepan on medium heat, heat vegetable oil, red curry paste, and about one third of the coconut milk. Heat for 5-10 minutes, stirring until it forms a thin gravy.
5. Turn off the heat, add the chicken, and cook until the chicken is half cooked, about five minutes.
6. Add fish sauce, sugar, salt, and the rest of the coconut milk, and mix well.
7. Stir in the curry powder, potatoes, carrots, and water or chicken stock. If desired, add 1/2 bay leaf. Let simmer for just a minute or two.
8. Add the fresh vegetables and frozen peas, and let simmer for 3 to 5 minutes until the fresh vegetables are just done.
9. Serve with jasmine rice.
